info.title: Haru CLI
info.description:
A minimal CLI for generating, managing, and
migrating Haru Web API projects.
------------------------------------------------------------
[!] Unknown command.

commands.name: create
commands.description:
A minimal CLI for generating, managing, and
migrating Haru Web API projects.
------------------------------------------------------------
[>] Creating project '--help' using MySQL...
[Error]: No templates or subcommands found matching: 'haru'.
Did you mean one of the following templates?
dotnet new page
To list installed templates similar to 'haru', run:
dotnet new list haru
To search for the templates on NuGet.org, run:
dotnet new search haru
For details on the exit code, refer to https://aka.ms/templating-exit-codes#103

commands.name: install
commands.description:
A minimal CLI for generating, managing, and
migrating Haru Web API projects.
------------------------------------------------------------
[>] Installing Haru Web API template globally...
The colon separator "::" has been deprecated in favor of the at symbol "@" for separating the package from the version in dotnet new install. In your case, this means Haru.Api@0.5.0 instead of Haru.Api::0.5.0.
The following template packages will be installed:
Haru.Api@0.5.0
Success: Haru.Api@0.5.0 installed the following templates:
Template Name  Short Name  Language  Tags
-------------  ----------  --------  ------------------
Haru Web API   haru        [C#]      Web/WebAPI/ASP.NET
